name: tutorial-env-secrets-databricks
title: Env Vars, Secrets & Databricks
description: Using environment variables and secrets in workflows. Shows top-level env block, per-step env overrides, {{SECRET}} interpolation syntax for platform-managed secrets, and a Databricks job step. Secrets are stored in the platform and injected at runtime — never hardcoded.

steps.name: Configure Job Parameters
steps.description: Set the parameters for the Databricks job run.

params.name: datasetName
params.description: Name of the dataset to process

steps.name: Run Databricks Job
steps.description: Trigger a Databricks job with the configured parameters. The platform polls for completion and captures the result.

steps.name: Verify Output
steps.description: Check that the Databricks job produced the expected output file.

steps.name: Send Completion Email
steps.description: Notify the team that the data job finished.

config.subject: Databricks job complete: ${steps['configure-job'].datasetName}
